summary: Backend regression for Fase 2 refactor (server.py 6431->4904 lines, 4 new route modules + auth.py spot-check + legacy server.py endpoints). Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_iteration_40.py with 68 tests covering all 44 extracted endpoints across notifications_friends.py, journal_bookmarks_progress.py, forum.py, parental_safety.py and a regression block for ~24 endpoints that remain in server.py (incl. legacy POST /api/messages renamed to send_message_legacy). Result: 68/68 PASSED. All extracted endpoints respond correctly via Bearer-token auth (per main agent guidance to avoid prior cookie-based false positives).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is still 4904 lines - large but Fase 2 made meaningful progress (44 endpoints extracted into 5 thin modules). Continue extraction (community/messages, quiz, bible, dictionary, groups, maps) toward a target of <2000 lines per file.

routes/journal_bookmarks_progress.py uses datetime.now().date() comparisons that mix tz-naive `today` with potentially tz-aware DB values; `last_date.date()` works but consider centralizing date helpers to avoid future tz bugs.

routes/forum.py vote endpoint computes returned `votes` field from in-memory `post['votes']` BEFORE the increment, which is correct but slightly fragile under concurrent writes. Safe enough for current scale.

routes/parental_safety.py update endpoint accepts updates even when no PIN is set yet (stored_hash falsy -> skip check). Document this as intentional for first-time setup or require PIN-set as precondition.

Two negative auth tests originally failed because requests.Session persists session cookies across calls; the API correctly returns 401 with a fresh requests call. No code change needed - test scaffolding fixed.
seed_data_creation: Created and immediately deleted: 1 forum post, 1 forum reply, 1 journal entry, 1 bookmark, 1 reading_history row (TEST_ prefix). PIN '4242' set on test user to validate verify/update flow - not cleared (harmless for adult user; can be reset by next test agent if needed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 40 validated Fase 2 backend refactor end-to-end with 68/68 pass. Reusable test file at /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_iteration_40.py covers: notifications, friends, journal, bookmarks, progress, forum (incl. vote toggle + reply), parental controls (PIN set/verify/update), safety, birth-date update, and full regression of remaining server.py endpoints incl. legacy POST /api/messages. Use Bearer-token auth (Authorization header) NOT shared cookies for negative-auth checks (cookie-based testing produced 2 false-positive 200s before fix). Test user PIN is currently 4242. Throwaway TEST_ users from iter 39 register/delete tests are cleaned up.
rca of the issue: No production bugs found. Only a test-side artifact: requests.Session retained the auth cookie set by /auth/login, so 'unauthenticated' negative tests appeared to bypass auth. Verified with isolated curl that /api/notifications and POST /api/forum/posts both return 401 without credentials. Fixed by using a fresh requests call (no shared session) for those 2 negative-auth tests.
